debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[none]

failed_attempts:
have : r = p := by
      have h := hpqr.div_add_div
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at h
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm]
    have hp : (p : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0 := by simpa using hr₀
    rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hp ENNReal.coe_ne_top, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hp ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    refine (ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow ?_ (by simp : 0 ≤ (p : ℝ)⁻¹)).trans_eq ?_
    · refine expect_mono fun i ↦ ?_
      rw [nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp : 0 ≤ (p : ℝ))]
      gcongr
      exact cLpNorm_le_inf _ _
    · simp_rw [mul_comm]
      rw [expect_const_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp : 0 ≤ (p : ℝ)⁻¹),
        ← ENNReal.rpow_mul, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hp ENNReal.coe_ne_top, ENNReal.rpow_one]
